_readme: Master registry of all Get4Domain client projects. Update after every phase change.
_lastUpdatedNote: MR_TRAVELS_001: EP01 approved, P002-P005 complete, P006 deployment PREPARATION complete (deployment itself NOT executed — payment/approval gate not yet clear). See docs/DEPLOYMENT_READINESS_REPORT.md.

clients.name: M.R. Travels & Tours
clients.note: EP01 approved by ChatGPT on 2026-07-05 (20-document Engineering Package + 5 phase prompts). P002-P005 complete (see phase notes below). P006 deployment PREPARATION complete (2026-07-06), deployment itself NOT executed: hardened production Dockerfiles (HEALTHCHECK added to both), docker-compose.prod.yml (backend+frontend+nginx, no postgres — Supabase is external), three-subdomain Nginx config (get4domain.com existing static site untouched, api.get4domain.com -> backend, mrtravels.get4domain.com -> frontend; SSL-ready via host-run Certbot, security headers, gzip, rate limiting), backend/.env.production.example + frontend/.env.production.example, scripts/deploy.sh + scripts/backup.sh + scripts/rollback.sh, and docs/13_DEPLOYMENT_SPECIFICATION.md updated to v2.0 (supersedes the v1.0 single-domain/containerized-Postgres draft from EP01). Fixed a real .gitignore gap along the way: .env.production was not previously covered. backend/frontend npm run build/lint both clean (0 errors); Docker itself was unavailable in this dev environment so container builds were not executed locally (documented limitation, see docs/DEPLOYMENT_READINESS_REPORT.md). No application code modified, no business features added, no server contacted, per explicit instruction. Payment/client-approval gate (REPOSITORY_RULES.md Rule 8) is NOT yet clear — payment.advance and payment.final below are both still 'pending'. scripts/deploy.sh must not be run against the production server until that gate clears and the owner explicitly authorizes it. Full detail in docs/DEPLOYMENT_READINESS_REPORT.md and docs/20_CURRENT_TASK.md §10.

P001.notes: Engineering foundation scaffolded (frontend, backend, docker, prisma shell)

P003.notes: RBAC/Authentication foundation plus all 35 catalog modules implemented (Leads/CRM, Customers, Packages, Fleet, Travel Services, Quotations, Bookings + 6 reservation types, Finance, Reports/Dashboard, Notifications, Documents, Settings). Prisma schema migrated and seeded against the live Supabase database. Known follow-ups: invoice PDF endpoint returns JSON pending a rendering library; a few role-based 'Own' scopes derived from related records where the approved schema has no dedicated owner field (documented in code).

P004.notes: Frontend wired to the live P003 backend across 4 milestones (5 commits on mr-travels-001 develop). Verified end-to-end incl. full Lead-to-Invoice workflow and GST split both ways. Real bugs found/fixed: CrudPage sending blank optional fields, missing @IsObject() on CreateTourPackageDto.itinerary, CreateVehicleDto/CreateDriverDto rejecting status on create, unauthenticated document download, systemic Prisma-Decimal-as-string summing bug, invalid lead status transitions, 2 permission-matrix transcription errors. Backend gap found but not fixed (flagged for change request): invoice issue() doesn't post a LedgerEntry per BRULE-010. P002 UI gaps found and logged, not fixed: missing staff-portal routes for Operations/Accounts roles (11_UI_SPECIFICATION.md sec4); Suppliers/Passport/Visa/Insurance/Forex/Ledger/Fixed-Departures/Custom-Requests/reservation-detail-types have no screen anywhere. Full detail in docs/20_CURRENT_TASK.md sec8.

P005.notes: Testing/QA/security hardening pass. 120/120 automated tests passing (57 unit + 63 integration, new). 7 genuine bugs found/fixed: 2 Critical (rate limiting never enforced; document uploads had no MIME-type validation), 1 High (Settings write endpoint rejected every request), 3 Medium (invoice issue/cancel missing LedgerEntry; customer notifications unreachable by the customer; 'payment received' notification never sent), 1 Low (tablet-breakpoint horizontal scroll). 5 findings logged, not fixed: broken stock photo; no customer-portal provisioning endpoint (recommend new CR); missing DB indexes at scale (schema change, out of scope); vehicle/driver expiry notifications need a scheduler that doesn't exist; CR-001 unchanged. Full detail in docs/P005_QA_REPORT.md, docs/P005_BUG_REPORT.md, docs/P005_RELEASE_READINESS_REPORT.md.

P006.notes: Deployment PREPARATION complete (2026-07-06) — deployment itself NOT executed. Hardened Dockerfiles, docker-compose.prod.yml (no postgres, Supabase external), 3-subdomain Nginx config, env templates, deploy/backup/rollback scripts, 13_DEPLOYMENT_SPECIFICATION.md v2.0. npm build/lint clean on both apps; Docker build not run locally (unavailable in this dev environment). Gated on client approval + final payment, neither confirmed yet — see docs/DEPLOYMENT_READINESS_REPORT.md.

updateInstructions: After phase complete: set phases[PXX].status = complete, completedAt = date
Set currentPhase to next phase, phaseStatus to in-progress
Commit: chore: P001 complete – update project registry
